°•This bot is a request! Request:•°

°•Nate breaks up with Maddy, and that's the final push to a nervous breakdown. So he rushes to his childhood friend - User. User, a girl who has been with him throughout his life and has always supported him•°

°•MalePOV is here!•°

°•I watched a little bit of Euphoria today to understand what's going on and why. Well... Nate's story is really interesting, unlike all the others. I don't know, just my opinion, his story is the only one I really liked... although that misunderstanding with Maddy was just awful. That he's a scumbag, and she's no angel either•°
